form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr6) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 8th-15.6 beaten a nose by Quickshift Girl (1:55.50) in NR up to 50 on March 19 at $10. Nicely drawn and expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into tenth after being driven well back, behind Mcbart at Menangle over 1609m in a 3yo+ 2LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR55 on March 17 at $151. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Where Back at Goulburn over 1710m in a NR up to 62 on March 30 at $81. Can improve. Sure to prove tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to obtain the lead approaching the 1200m.

form.formComment: Returns after three-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into tenth behind Bring Your Best at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 47 on December 20 at $3.50. Previous preparation first-up failed to make any headway until the straight; raced back and made ground from the turn; won by a head (Sr4) at Cowra (2:04.20) beating Financially Stable in NR UP TO 40 on September 14 at $9. Finds a nice race to kick off.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride free of any external factors near the 400m.
Approaching the 1300m became unbalanced and broke gait.

form.formComment: Resumed when over this distance beaten 13 m fifth behind Grumpyshannon in a 3yo NR up to 60 on March 28. Expect a much better run this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to hang in rounding the final turn and contacted marker pegs.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after nine days. Lacklustre first-up performance when 5th (Sr2) over 2030m at this track, beaten 25 m by Grace Shannon (2:28.50) in NR up to 48 on March 28 at $15. Not keen on his chances in this field.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1609m at this track, beaten 10 m by Sinbinned (1:54.40) in NR up to 48 on April 2 at $19. Two runs back 10th (Sr1) over 1609m at this track, beaten 25 m by Rockin Bull (1:53.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 19 at $17. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Sweet Rocky at this track over 2030m in a NR up to 58 on March 28 at $4.20. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Spunkys Gotsecrets at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 58 on April 2 at $14. Rates highly. Genuine threat.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr1) over 2030m at this track beaten 22 m by Quickshift Girl (2:27.70) in NR up to 55 M on April 2 at $21. At her previous start 5th (Fr1) over 1980m after showing early speed at Tamworth, at the bell was 3rd-5.8 beaten 9 m by Escalera (2:26.80) in NR up to 53 on March 26 at $4. Can do much better.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle, at the bell was 3rd-4.13 beaten 11 m by Mister Jones (1:52.90) in 3yo+ 2LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR55 on March 24 at $10. Before that, 5th (Sr2) over 1740m at Bankstown, beaten 22 m by The Best Of You (2:11.20) in NR up to 52 on March 16 at $10. Certainly worth another chance.
